title: Fix mkdirSync static import and verify gates
description: Confirm mkdirSync is statically imported from "fs" at top of src/store/graph.ts, save() has no await, then run npm run build, npm test, and npm run lint to verify all gates pass. Update CLAUDE.md known-issues entry once gates are green.

plan.objective: Verify that the mkdirSync static import issue in src/store/graph.ts is resolved and confirm all gate checks pass, ensuring the bug fix for CART-B01 is complete and sprint acceptance criteria are satisfied.
key_changes: Verify src/store/graph.ts has mkdirSync in top-level import statement
Confirm save() function is synchronous with no await expressions
Run npm run build to verify TypeScript compilation with no errors
Run npm test to verify all 31 tests pass including regression guard
Run npm run lint to verify code style compliance
Update CLAUDE.md known issues section if CART-B01 entry exists
Validate all six acceptance criteria are satisfied
